title: 40 Artist Pencils Set with Storage Tin – Coloured, Watercolour, Charcoal, Drawing & Metallic Pencils – for Sketching Shading & Colouring – Art Kit for Artists & Beginners – Durable Metal Case
features: COMPREHENSIVE ARTIST PENCIL SET : Includes 9 colouring pencils, 9 watercolour pencils, 6 charcoal pencils, 7 drawing pencils, and 9 metallic pencils – ideal for all your creative projects
PREMIUM-QUALITY MATERIALS : Smooth application and vibrant colours with durable, long-lasting pencils – perfect for sketching, shading, and detailed illustrations
DURABLE STORAGE TIN : Comes in a sturdy metal tin measuring 34cm x 19cm, ensuring your pencils are organised and protected – great for on-the-go artists or home use
VERSATILE FOR ALL ARTISTS: Suitable for professionals, beginners, and students – ideal for everything from fine lines and shading to bold metallic accents and watercolour effects
GIFT FOR ARTISTS: The ideal all-in-one set for aspiring artists, hobbyists, or professionals
CONTENTS : 9 x Colouring Pencils, 9 x Watercolour Pencils, 6 x Charcoal Pencils, 7 x Drawing Pencils (H, B, HB, 2H, 3H, 4H, 4B) 9 x Metallic Pencils, Storage Tin
description: This comprehensive 40-piece artist pencils set is designed for artists of all levels. Whether you’re an experienced professional or just starting your artistic journey, this set has everything you need to bring your ideas to life. The set includes a mix of 9 colouring pencils, 9 watercolour pencils, 6 charcoal pencils, 7 drawing pencils, and 9 metallic pencils, providing endless possibilities for sketching, shading, colouring, and more. Quality and variety are at the heart of this kit. The vibrant colouring pencils allow for smooth, precise colouring, while the watercolour pencils can be used dry or blended with water for stunning watercolour effects. The charcoal pencils are ideal for achieving deep, rich shading and dramatic contrasts, and the metallic pencils add a bold, reflective shine that’s perfect for special highlights or detailed accents. The drawing pencils cover a wide range of hardness, from H to 4B, making them suitable for fine lines, detailed sketching, and bold shading. Everything comes packaged in a durable metal storage tin, which is not only sleek but also highly practical. At 34cm x 19cm, it’s the perfect size to keep your pencils organised and secure, whether you’re working at home, in the studio, or on the go. The tin helps prevent damage to your pencils, ensuring they stay in great condition for years to come. This artist pencils set is perfect for a range of projects, including detailed illustrations, bold sketches, watercolour washes, and metallic highlights. Whether you're a student exploring different mediums or a professional looking to expand your toolkit, this set provides all the tools you need. It also makes an excellent gift for budding artists, hobbyists, or professionals who want to improve their creative skills.
